variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14591 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14591 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14591 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P777105 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14591
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P777105 Air Filter, Primary Round is crafted to provide outstanding engine protection by filtering out dust, dirt, and debris before they reach the combustion chamber. Its round design maximizes airflow while maintaining exceptional filtration efficiency, supporting better fuel economy and engine performance. Perfect for trucks, heavy machinery, and industrial equipment, this filter is built to withstand harsh conditions. Its durable construction extends service intervals, reducing maintenance frequency and ensuring long-lasting engine health.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 27 1390 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14591
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4641M Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14591
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4641M premium axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
